monitors.name: chain-state-watcher
monitors.description: Alerts when OrchestKit chain state becomes stale (>30min) during multi-phase skills
monitors.command: while true; do if [ -f .claude/chain/state.json ]; then updated=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"updated":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); if [ -n "$updated" ]; then now=$(date -u +%s); then_ts=$(date -jf '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S' "${updated%%.*}" +%s 2>/dev/null || date -d "$updated" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0); diff=$((now - then_ts)); if [ "$diff" -gt 1800 ]; then skill=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"skill":"[^"]*"' | cut -d'"' -f4); phase=$(cat .claude/chain/state.json 2>/dev/null | grep -o '"current_phase":[0-9]*' | cut -d: -f2); echo "Chain state stale: /ork:${skill:-unknown} phase ${phase:-?} unchanged for $((diff/60))min — consider /recap or resume"; fi; fi; fi; sleep 300; done

monitors.name: uncommitted-work-reminder
monitors.description: Periodic reminder when significant uncommitted changes accumulate
monitors.command: sleep 600; while true; do changed=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -o '[0-9]* file' | grep -o '[0-9]*' || echo 0); if [ "$changed" -gt 10 ]; then echo "$changed files with uncommitted changes — consider /ork:commit to save progress"; fi; sleep 900; done
